themes.reasoning_notes: Aura that enchants your creature; most natural home is Aura/enchantress-style shells rather than generic red decks.
Gives repeatable 1-damage pings to opposing fliers, functioning as very narrow creature interaction.
Cheap Aura that must enchant your own creature, so it naturally fits Aura-centric decks more than generic red shells; its payoff is narrow and low-impact.
Activated ability can repeatedly ping opposing fliers, but only hits creatures with flying and requires both mana and a creature to wear the Aura.
